steps.speaker: IshiYoga
lines: I heard every boss fall through the pipes.
Papers, bananas, berries, fireworks, then a guitar solo strong enough to shake the chains loose.
I also heard you asking each guard about KFC.
You are exactly as the town described.
Ishiville has been waiting for someone impossible.

steps.speaker: Shrububu
lines: There is enough chicken for two rulers.
We free the town first. Then we eat before the bucket gets cold.
